title: Integrate Facial Rust app capabilities into native Handshake Ingest
operator_request: The Rust facial.exe app is used a lot and should be rebuilt as Handshake native tools for image mining and LoRA training ingest.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Inspect the external Facial source/spec before implementation. Port capabilities into Handshake-native modules; do not shell out to facial.exe as the default product path unless explicitly accepted as a transitional adapter.

scope.summary: Bring Facial's Rust image-quality, identity, dedupe, review, and dataset-prep capabilities into Handshake native Ingest.
base_scope: Research/inspect Facial product source and app spec.
Map Facial capabilities to Handshake Ingest primitives and receipts.
Implement native quality, identity, dedupe, and review assistance as reusable Handshake tools.
Expose headless commands/receipts for model agents and visible Ingest controls for operators.
Link Facial-derived results to CKC character/image review state.
Update internal UserManual with Facial-backed Ingest tools.
acceptance_criteria: Facial capability map exists from source/spec to Handshake native functions.
At least one high-value Facial capability is implemented natively in Ingest.
Results are attributable, persisted, and linkable to CKC/Ingest review sets.
Argus can inspect and steer the Facial-backed Ingest surface.
verification: Capability-map review against external Facial source/spec.
Native backend tests for implemented capability.
Native UI/Argus evidence for operator/model workflow.
